full_text:
Plan for sample S102 culturing,

Cell count:

total: 1.02e7

live: 7.93e6

viability: 77.4%

size: 9.1 um

Total cell count: 1.095e7 / ml

Dissociation for 1h40 min, resuspended to 5 mL

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (3 drops):

DNA/RNA: 30 wells x 50 µl x = 1800 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 3.60E6 cells

(Note! Volume of the organoid adjusted after starting the pipetting)

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 900 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 164 µl

cells in medium → 450 µl

ome-gel → 127 µl

aprotinin → 2.7 µl

thrombin → 2.7 µl

fibrinogen → 18 µl

FFPE: 3 wells x 50 µl x = 180 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 0.36E6 cells

(Note! Volume of the organoid adjusted after starting the pipetting)

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: µl

cells in medium → 90 µl

ome-gel → 25.4 µl

aprotinin → 0.54 µl

thrombin → 0.54 µl

fibrinogen → 3.6 µl

For 48 well = 300 uL medium

Sample id: S102_pOme

total: 1.17e7

live: 6.79e6

viability: 58.1 %

size: 9.2 um

B) Drug treatment:

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

54 wells x 50 µl = 3240 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 5.40E6 cells

(Note! Volume of the organoid adjusted after starting the pipetting)

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1080 µl each

(18 wells)

volume to take from cell suspension: µl

cells in medium → 823.8 µl

ome-gel → 152.3 µl

aprotinin → 3.2 µl

thrombin → 3.2 µl

fibrinogen → 21.6 µl

For 48 well = 300 uL medium

C) IF on drug treatment:

9 conditions x 8 µl x 6 wells/sample = 540 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 1.08E6 cells

(Note! Volume of the organoid adjusted after starting the pipetting)

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: µl

cells in medium → 411.9 µl

ome-gel → 76.1 µl

aprotinin → 1.6 µl

thrombin → 1.6 µl

fibrinogen → 10.8 µl

For 96 well = 150 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer = 0.274 mL

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 3.1 mL cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Drug treatment conditions:

Plate 1

control

olaparib 20

olaparib 40

pembro 10

pembro 20

OLA20 + pembro 10

OLA 40 + pembro 50

ATXi 0.5 uM

Plate 2

2 x control

OLA20 + ATXi 0.5 uM

Treatment plan:

For 48 well plate: 350 uL / 50 uL = [x7]

→ 6 wells each = 300 uL

For 96 well plate: 175 uL / 25 uL = [x7]

→ 6 wells each = 150 uL

Cells treated 24 hours after the embedding - 19.8.2021. Cells had formed small (2-5 cell) clusters already.

Notes from the culture: very big clusters already on Day 0; biggest ones had already dropped down to the bottom

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Compound | [Stock] | Location of the stock | [working] | [end]
(450 uL + 50 uL extra) | c1v1 = c2v2;
c1*350 uL =c2*X
DMSO (control) | 100 % | RT, lab | 0.1 % | 0.7 % | 3.5 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 7 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 40 uM | 280 uM | 14 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 7 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 50 ug / mL | 350 ug / mL | 35 uL
OlaPembro | see above | see above | 20 uM + 
10 ug / mL | 140 uM
70 ug / mL | 7 uL +
7 uL +
OlaPembro | see above | see above | 40 uM + 
50 ug / mL | 280 uM
350 ug / mL | 14 uL +
35 uL +
ATXi_1 | 1 mM | -80 C | 0.5 uM | 3.5 uM | 1.75 uL
OlaATXi_1 | see above | see above | 20 uM + 
0.5 uM | 140 uM
3.5 uM | 7 uL +
1.75 uL
